name: cyber-threat-dashboard
description: Cyber Threat Dashboard - Monorepo with Frontend (React + Vite) and Backend (Express + Socket.IO)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend:strict
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend & npm run build:backend
